Résumé: Setup project and database structure
As a DEVELOPER, I want a database infrastructure, so that we can store app data
As a DEVELOPER, I want my pushed code to trigger an automatic build and unit tests, ensuring regular and reliable code integration
As a DEVELOPER, I want a project environment to build the application
As a USER, I want the app to be a PWA (Progressive Web App) to enhance my UX on web and mobile platforms
As a DEVELOPER, I want a plugin to sort my plugins
Create git repository
Create Project Guidelines and Initial Management
As a USER, I want a clear GDPR statement to understand how my data is used
As the CLIENT, I want a mockup of the tender response
As the CLIENT, I want a Gantt chart to visualize the project timeline
As the CLIENT, I want a GREEN IT document
Create Jira
Create all epics and stories
Create Epic chronology on Jira
MINTER Registration and Login
As a MINTER, I can create an account, when I provide my e-mail and a password
As a MINTER, I can delete my account.
As a MINTER, I can reset my password
Profile Creation and Customization
As a MINTER, I can change my profile's unique link
As a MINTER, I can change my profile's picture by uploading it
As a MINTER, I can change my profile's bio
As a MINTER, I can change my profile's username, if not already taken
MINTER Privacy/Security Settings
As a MINTER, I can securely change my e-mail
As a MINTER, I can add or remove a 2FA authentication
As a MINTER, I can change the app's interface language
As a MINTER, I can securely change my password
As a MINTER, I can enable "search by e-mail" feature
As a MINTER, I can change the visibility of my profile
As a MINTER, I can import my contacts from my phone's contacts or social network account
Social Features (single MINTER)
As a MINTER, I can load more comments
As a MINTER, I can follow other users and see their content in my feed
As a MINTER, I can like/dislike an NFT (Part 1)
As a MINTER, I can comment on an NFT (Part 1)
As a MINTER, I can share a link to a specific NFT
As a MINTER, I can report an NFT
As a MINTER, I can fold/unfold comments thread
As a MINTER, I can see users' profile
As a MINTER, I can see on a MINTER's profile, the list of his NFTs
As a MINTER, I can share a link to a specific MINTER's profile
As a MINTER, I can accept or ignore follow requests from other users
As a MINTER, I can send private messages to other users
As a MINTER, I can report a MINTER (profile)
As a MINTER, I can report a comment
As a MINTER, I can comment on an NFT (Part 2)
Social Features (multi MINTERS aka TEA BAG)
As a MINTER, I can create a TEA BAG (club)
As a COOK, I can manage the NFTs of the TEA BAG I'm member of
As a COOK, I can manage the TEA BAG profile
As a COOK, I can delete the TEA BAG profile
As a MINTER, I can report a TEA BAG
Original Content Management
As a MINTER, I can upload an original content
As a MINTER, I can delete any of my own original content
As a MINTER, I can create a draft from my uploaded original content before making
Admin Dashboard
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can log to the admin dashboard when I provide my username and password
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can list all reports
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can delete a MINTER's account
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can disable a MINTER's account
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can see a dashboard with different analytics
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can delete a comment
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can delete a TEA BAG
[BACKOFFICE] As an ADMIN, I can delete an NFT
Search
As a MINTER, I can access to all NFTs related to an hashtag from the NFT page
As a MINTER, I can search users and TEA BAGS
As a MINTER, I can search NFTs
As a MINTER, I can search NFTs and users or tea bags
Notifications
As a MINTER, I can disable notification by type
As a MINTER, I can see the list of all my notifications
As a MINTER, I can ignore all comments related to a specific NFT from the notification list
Cryptocurrency Integration
As a MINTER, I can add cryptocurrencies to my wallet
As a MINTER, I can buy and sell NFTs using my cryptocurrency wallet
NFT Trading and Marketplace
As a MINTER, I can mint my uploaded digital content (a draft) into an NFT
As a MINTER, I can trade NFTs with other users, when I find a MINTER interested in trading their NFT
As a MINTER, I can buy NFTs from other users, when I find an NFT I like in the marketplace
As a MINTER, I can sell my NFTs in the marketplace
